view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for one offer version to expose multiple admission paths is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for one offer version to expose multiple admission paths is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence shows that the offer version allows both queue and online slot bookings simultaneously, as demonstrated by the successful bookings from both customer one and customer two. The linked use case explicitly states the need for one offer version to handle multiple admission paths, which is confirmed by the operational data showing unified revenue and booking management under a single offer version. Additionally, the prior steps indicate that the offer was created and published correctly, supporting the requirement's fulfillment.
